headline: Jim Cramer on ServiceNow: “These Gains, They May Be Ephemeral”
summary: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) was among the stocks Jim Cramer commented on as he advised investors on how to take advantage of Wednesday’s market rotation. Cramer noted the AI worries around the stock, as he commented: Next up, after cratering all year, the software-as-a-service stocks like Salesforce, like ServiceNow, oh, they were flying today. Now, these […]
